title: TaskRun
description: A task run executing a standalone task or a DAG of tasks starting from the root task.

root_task_name.description: The name of the root task in the current task run.

database_name.description: The name of the current database for the task run.

schema_name.description: The name of the current schema for the task run.

state.description: The current state of the task run.

first_error_task_name.description: The name of the first task throwing an error in the task run.

first_error_code.description: The first error code thrown in the task run.

first_error_message.description: The first error message thrown in the task run.

scheduled_time.description: The scheduled time for the task run.

query_start_time.description: The start time for the task run query.

next_scheduled_time.description: The next upcoming time for the task run.

completed_time.description: The time this task run was last completed.

root_task_id.description: The unique task ID for the root task.

graph_version.description: The current version of the DAG on the task run.

run_id.description: The unique ID for the current task run.
